name: Niamos
description: Rural agricultural world; home of Syril Karn and Bix Caleen.

name: Fest
description: Prison/industrial world where Cassian is sent; Imperial prison labor site.

name: Aldhani
description: Imperial-ruled world notable for an Imperial ceremony and a rebel heist.

name: Fero
description: Industrial/urban world appearing in background scenes.

name: Haidha
description: Small settled worlds and outposts seen briefly (various cantina/market scenes).

name: Wri
description: Background planet name sometimes referenced in production notes and tie material.

name: Syril's home (unnamed / Niamos-related)
description: The Karn family farm region (often treated as part of Niamos).
